response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior role, lacks demonstrable Java proficiency (only listed as a skill without project context), has only basic German (a hard requirement), and has no clear experience in insurance sector or agile consulting projects.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Proven track record in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
concerns: Only basic German proficiency — fails core language requirement
Overqualified as a senior/staff engineer, not a junior contributor
No evidence of Java usage in production or insurance/consulting projects
